blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 183 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
